display.purpose: Hero headlines only. All-caps or title-case. Tight tracking (-0.03em).

heading.purpose: Section titles, modal headers, card titles. All-caps recommended.

body.purpose: Paragraphs, descriptions, long-form content. Cap at 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Status badges, nav links, button text, metadata, section markers.

shadows.name: neon-border-glow
shadows.purpose: Applied on hover to interactive elements with neon-border. Evokes CRT power-on.

shadows.name: terminal-drop-shadow
shadows.purpose: Terminal module top shadow for physical panel illusion.

shadows.name: mobile-nav-glow
shadows.purpose: Bottom mobile nav bar ambient glow.

motion.name: ease-state
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover, focus).

motion.name: ease-enter
motion.purpose: Easing for entrance animations (fade in, slide up).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Filled cyan primary CTA button. Used for main actions: 'EXECUTE', 'GET STARTED', primary nav links.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #00f0ff; color: #000; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', 'Cairo', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 900; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: 0.3em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 16px 40px; border: 1px solid #00f0ff; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: all 300ms ease; box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(0, 240, 255, 0.4), inset 0 0 5px rgba(0, 240, 255, 0.2); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: transparent; color: #00f0ff; box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0, 240, 255, 0.6), inset 0 0 8px rgba(0, 240, 255, 0.3); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #fff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outlined Button
components.description: Outlined secondary CTA button. Used for secondary actions: 'LIVE DEMO', language toggle.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: transparent; color: #00f0ff; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', 'Cairo', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 900; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: 0.3em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 16px 40px; border: 1px solid #00f0ff; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: all 300ms ease; box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(0, 240, 255, 0.4), inset 0 0 5px rgba(0, 240, 255, 0.2); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #00f0ff; color: #000; box-shadow: 0 0 25px rgba(0, 240, 255, 0.6), inset 0 0 8px rgba(0, 240, 255, 0.3); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #fff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Terminal Badge
components.description: Small inline status badge with pulsing indicator dot. Used for section headers and status labels.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 4px 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(0, 240, 255, 0.5); background: rgba(0, 240, 255, 0.05); } .ds-badge-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: #00f0ff; animation: ds-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes ds-pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.4; } } .ds-badge-text { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', 'Cairo', monospace; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.3em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #00f0ff; } .ds-badge:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #fff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Navigation Link
components.description: Top bar navigation link with underline-on-active treatment.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', 'Cairo', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.3em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(0, 240, 255, 0.8); text-decoration: none; padding: 4px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid transparent; transition: all 200ms ease; cursor: pointer; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #00f0ff; border-bottom-color: #00f0ff; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #fff; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-nav-link.active { color: #00f0ff; border-bottom-color: #00f0ff; }

components.name: Skill Tag
components.description: Technology stack tag used inside project cards and skill grids.
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-block; padding: 4px 8px; background: #0f172a; border: 1px solid rgba(0, 240, 255, 0.2); font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', 'Cairo', monospace; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 700; color: #00f0ff; text-transform: uppercase; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1; }

components.name: Stat Panel
components.description: Statistics info panel used in project cards. Two-column key-value layout with left cyan border.
components.html:
TECH STACKReact / Node
STATUSPRIVATE
components.css: .ds-stat-panel { background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.8); border-left: 2px solid #00f0ff; padding: 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', 'Cairo', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; } .ds-stat-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-stat-key { color: #64748b; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 0.625rem; letter-spacing: 0.05em; } .ds-stat-value { color: #00f0ff; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 0.625rem; } .ds-stat-danger { color: #f59e0b; }

components.name: TerminalPrompt
components.description: Terminal command input line with system prompt prefix and blinking caret.
components.html: ~:ahmedismaildev/admin:/ $
components.css: .ds-terminal-line { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; } .ds-prompt { color: #00f0ff; text-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(0, 240, 255, 0.6); white-space: pre; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-terminal-input { background: transparent; border: none; outline: none; color: #fff; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; width: 100%; caret-color: #00f0ff; } .ds-terminal-input:focus-visible { outline: none; }

components.name: Progress Bar
components.description: Thin horizontal progress bar with cyan fill. Used inside floating stat panels in the hero section.
components.css: .ds-progress-track { height: 4px; width: 100%; background: rgba(0, 240, 255, 0.2); } .ds-progress-fill { height: 100%; background: #00f0ff; transition: width 600ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); }

narrative.overview:
A dark industrial interface that feels like a mission-control console for a precision engineering operation. The aesthetic is cyberpunk refined — retaining the neon-cyan pulse of the original direction but stripped of gimmicks. Scanlines and flicker become rare, earned effects rather than default decoration. Every visual element reads as functional: status indicators, system prompts, terminal modules, grid overlays. The monitor glow is not decoration — it's the interface's own voice.

This system explicitly rejects corporate template sterility, generic developer-portfolio patterns (overused terminal themes, blue-on-white gradients), and any surface that feels loud without purpose. The confidence comes from precision, not from volume.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-on-dark with high-contrast cyan accent as the single voice
Monospaced typography throughout — IBM Plex Mono as the system font
Grid-based backgrounds that evoke engineering blueprints and HUD displays
Sharp, zero-radius corners on containers; right angles as the default
Functional decorations: status badges, progress bars, corner brackets, system labels
Motion as feedback, not as ornament

rules.name: The Cyan Ceiling Rule
rules.body: The primary cyan accent occupies no more than 15% of any viewport. Its rarity is the point — when cyan appears (border, text glow, progress bar), it signals something active or interactive.

rules.name: The No-Warmth Rule
rules.body: The palette contains zero warm tones. No beige, amber, orange, or brown. The system is deliberately cool.

rules.name: The Single Family Rule
rules.body: All text uses IBM Plex Mono (or Cairo for Arabic). No second font family enters the system.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest — no shadow, no elevation. Glow appears only as a response to state (hover, focus, active).

dos: Do use IBM Plex Mono for all text. No other font family enters the system.
Do use pure black (#000000) for card containers — the void effect is intentional.
Do keep cyan accent below 15% of any viewport. Rarity signals interactivity.
Do use sharp zero-radius corners on all containers. Right angles reinforce the industrial identity.
Do use text-wrap: balance on h1–h3 and text-wrap: pretty on body prose.
Do add prefers-reduced-motion fallbacks to every animation (instant reveal or crossfade).
Do maintain 4.5:1 minimum contrast for body text.
Do cap body line length at 65–75ch.
Do use progress bars and status indicators as functional decoration — not ornament.
donts: Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient).
Don't add side-stripe borders on cards or callouts.
Don't use numbered section markers across every page.
Don't put the tiny uppercase tracked eyebrow above every section heading.
Don't use monospace as a lazy shorthand for 'developer.'
Don't make cards identical across the site.
Don't use bounce or elastic easings.
Don't let text overflow its container.
